title: Talk about the video
prompt: Use one or two sentences to respond to this scene: I've been dreaming, I've been waiting, praying hard and never breaking
sample: I've been dreaming, I've been waiting, praying hard and never breaking

ja.prompt: 字幕の語を使って一、二文で答えてください。
ja.hint: 字幕の言葉を再利用してください。
ja.sample: I've been dreaming, I've been waiting, praying hard and never breaking

zh.prompt: 請用一到兩句回應這個情境。
zh.sample: I've been dreaming, I've been waiting, praying hard and never breaking
